updates.heading: Foundation Tracker — Track All Roles (Action Required)
bullets: Teresa asked the Foundation team (Dylan Cook, Helen Oh, Isabel Macias) to add ALL roles they're working on to the Foundation tracker — not just Foundation-org roles
For non-Foundation roles, leave column C blank; fill in column I with the hiring team
More Foundation + flex roles coming down the pipe — this enables better workload visibility

updates.heading: Prospect Posting Location Format Reminder
bullets: Locations in prospect postings must follow the format: 'United States - CITY, STATE'
Ensure spelling is correct — align with all other job req postings

updates.heading: AI Workshop Cancelled June 26 — People All Hands Themes Coming
bullets: Teresa cancelled the AI workshop (FTEs only) for June 26 given team workload
For those who couldn't join the People Team All Hands, Teresa will share key themes and need-to-knows early next week in #flnp_invite_pod

updates.heading: Stale Apps/Referrals Cleanup — Foundation Pod
bullets: Teresa flagged stale candidates in apps/referrals and asked team to review the Req Audit 6/24 tab
Cleanup of stale apps, referrals, and candidates was due end of week June 26

updates.heading: Paul West Nominated & Won People Using AI Award
bullets: Paul West had two submissions in the #people-using-ai competition and won the recognition
